title: Ausi-Trader
seo_description: An autonomous multi-agent micro-futures trading system with live Interactive Brokers execution and a walk-forward + Monte Carlo validation gauntlet.
summary: Engineering rigor with real money on the line: an autonomous multi-agent trading system for micro futures — not a backtest notebook, a live platform routing real orders.

blocks.heading: Ausi-Trader
blocks.lede_md: An autonomous multi-agent trading system for micro futures. Nothing trades until it survives the gauntlet: backtest, walk-forward analysis, Monte Carlo permutation testing, then paper trading — only then does a strategy touch capital.

blocks.body_md:
## The problem
Most retail trading systems die one of two deaths: they are backtest fantasies that never survive live fills, or they are live cowboys with no statistical evidence behind them.

Ausi-Trader exists to hold both bars at once — **strategies discovered by automated research, promoted only through out-of-sample validation, and executed live with institutional-style risk controls.**
